name: Com Hem AB
notes:
Com Hem does NOT accept any new peering. Please see http://as1257.peeringdb.com/ for peering.

Com Hem delivers TV, telephony and high-speed internet access to Swedish homes and businesses through the Com Hem, Boxer and Phonera brands. We are one of Sweden’s leading suppliers, selling our services to about 1.5 million customers in both apartment buildings (multiple dwelling units) and houses (single dwelling units) through our FibreCoax network, fibre networks, and the digital terrestrial network.
